name: Claw HQ
description: Backend plugin for the Claw HQ self-hosted GUI — project-scoped chats, sub-project task toggles, file uploads, cross-device live feed.

workspaceRoot.description: Absolute path to the workspace directory the plugin should surface as projects. Defaults to the OpenClaw agent workspace when omitted.

workspaceRoot.label: Workspace root
workspaceRoot.help: Folder whose top-level entries become Claw HQ projects.
